_comment: Text for the /maps (Mapped areas) page. Edited via the CMS at /admin → Site settings → Maps page text. The map cards themselves are pulled from the Maps content collection automatically.

hero.lede: Every venue PFO has surveyed and run on, from town-centre street-Os to open moorland fells. For previous courses and routes, head to [PFO RouteGadget →](https://www.pfo.routegadget.co.uk/rg2/)

terrainBlurbs.urban: Streets, housing estates, town parks. Quick decisions, lots of cut-throughs.
terrainBlurbs.parkland: Mature parks and school grounds. Friendly to newcomers and families.
terrainBlurbs.forest: Plantation and mixed woodland. Real navigation, careful contour reading.
terrainBlurbs.moorland: Open hill country, rough grass and heather. Lancashire at its best.
terrainBlurbs.mtbo: Mountain bike orienteering. Rideable forest tracks and singletrack.
